message:
feat(runtime): Add PyValue-only equality functions to reduce monomorphization

Add pyValueEql and typed fast paths (intEql, floatEql, stringEql, boolEql)
to equality.zig for comparing values without anytype monomorphization.

These functions compile ONCE regardless of call sites, providing:
- pyValueEql: PyValue-based comparison with runtime dispatch
- intEql/floatEql/stringEql/boolEql: Typed fast paths for known types

Foundation for solving comptime monomorphization explosion in core1 tests.
